scripts.lint:frontend: node --check assets/iiq.js && node --check assets/legal_pages.js && node --check assets/adaptive_loading.js && node --check assets/design_system.js && node --check scripts/audit-accessibility.mjs
scripts.check:styles: mkdir -p /tmp/factorresearch-css && sass --no-source-map assets/style.scss /tmp/factorresearch-css/style.css && sass --no-source-map assets/company_analysis.scss /tmp/factorresearch-css/company_analysis.css && sass --no-source-map assets/error_pages.scss /tmp/factorresearch-css/error_pages.css && diff -u assets/style.css /tmp/factorresearch-css/style.css && diff -u assets/company_analysis.css /tmp/factorresearch-css/company_analysis.css && diff -u assets/error_pages.css /tmp/factorresearch-css/error_pages.css
scripts.check:design-system: PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/generate-design-tokens.py && PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/check-design-system.py
scripts.quality:frontend: npm run lint:frontend && npm run check:styles
